scripts.build: tsc -b && tsup --config packages/client/tsup.config.ts && tsup --config packages/client/tsup.browser.config.ts && tsup --config packages/adapters/home-assistant/tsup.config.ts && node -e "const{cpSync,mkdirSync}=require('fs');mkdirSync('packages/proxy/dist/transports/staticAssets',{recursive:true});cpSync('packages/proxy/src/transports/staticAssets/wsbridge-shim.js','packages/proxy/dist/transports/staticAssets/wsbridge-shim.js');"
